vandiyńĀ praphullamane, e bhaktivinoda bhaŠĻáe,
rŇępńĀnuga‚čÖbhajana‚čÖdarpaŠĻáa
en_translation: Ňörńę Guru, Ňörńę Gaura‚čÖcandra, the divine youthful couple in VŠĻõndńĀvana, and the holy feet of the residents of Vraja- Having offered obeisances with a joyful heart, this Bhaktivinoda says: This is a mirror of the devotional service of the followers of RŇępa GosvńĀmńę.
